about.bio.1: My intrigues and curiosity spans all aspects of my daily life. With hobbies ranging from entreprenurial habits in Real Estate investing, to constructing interior spaces that meet livabilty standards, my mind is non-stop solving problems. And my lack of knowledge in any aspect pushes me towards edification.
about.bio.2: Ultimately, it's my technical and communication skills shine, I'm told, the most.
about.quote.text: Great design starts with deep empathy and ends with measurable impact.

modal.project.0.challenge: Within four months of adoption, insights generated by the platform directly informed targeted marketing campaigns and customer engagement strategies that reversed a negative profit trajectory. The business moved from a –17% margin to a +2% margin, improved customer retention and subscription renewals, increased average cart size, and reduced friction for entrepreneurs onboarding new customers—demonstrating how thoughtfully applied generative AI can drive measurable commercial outcomes when grounded in meaningful design and research principles.

modal.project.0.outcome.1: 15% customer retention and subscription renewals from real, actionable behavioral insights.
modal.project.0.outcome.2: 10% increased average cart size and customer lifetime value.
modal.project.0.outcome.3: Reduced customer acquisition friction and onboarding; enrolling new customers, by proactively addressing needs.
modal.project.0.outcome.4: Scaled organization awareness of customers, empowering ~40 users across sales, customer service, field development, and executive leadership.
modal.project.0.outcomes.heading: Key Outcomes
modal.project.0.overview: An AI-assisted persona generation platform built on live  and active business intelligence data. It combines structured behavioral, demographic, and psychological insights—enabling teams to understand not just who customers were, but how and why they made decisions.

modal.project.1.challenge: I architected and led delivery of a comprehensive design system to modernize a fragmented web and portal experience spanning marketing, sales, consumer-facing reports, and internal communications tools. The goal was not only visual renewal, but a durable system improving consistency, scalability, and execution speed—aligning design decisions with business outcomes and consumer needs.
modal.project.1.kpi.0.label: Reduction in time to deliver
modal.project.1.kpi.1.label: Designers impacted
modal.project.1.kpi.2.label: More design deliverables
modal.project.1.kpi.3.label: Designer hours saved
modal.project.1.outcome.0: Established consistent design patterns across products, eliminating inconsistencies between designers and teams.
modal.project.1.outcome.1: A shared source of truth clarifying scope, deliverables, and expectations for all design artifacts.
modal.project.1.outcome.2: Alignment between UX strategy and business goals by embedding intent directly into system standards.
modal.project.1.outcome.3: Increased confidence and autonomy of junior and mid-level designers through clear, repeatable patterns.
modal.project.1.outcome.4: Gained executive trust by providing visible, consistent standards referenced across deliverables org-wide.
modal.project.1.outcomes.heading: Key Outcomes
modal.project.1.overview: Delivered as a hybrid greenfield and progressive migration, the system lives in Figma and is referenced directly in Contentful, enabling designers, engineers, and leaders to operate from a shared source of truth. Adoption materially improved delivery speed, design quality, and team confidence—transforming design from a reactive service into a scalable, strategic capability.

modal.project.1.quote.text: This new system changed how we work. Delivery time was cut by roughly 50%. Visual and interaction quality jumped by about 80%. We went from weeks assembling concepts to delivering clean, standardized prototypes in days. It raised the bar for every project.

modal.project.1.title: Design System Architect
modal.project.4.challenge: Leading the end-to-end refactoring of cart and checkout for a high-growth e-commerce company facing critical revenue leakage from extreme abandonment exceeding 80%. Declining consumer trust and checkout flows that diverged significantly from modern retail standards positioned this as a business recovery effort—not a visual refresh.
modal.project.4.kpi.0.label: Monthly Cart Interactions
modal.project.4.kpi.1.label: Less Abandonment
modal.project.4.kpi.2.label: Trust in Experience
modal.project.4.kpi.3.label: Target Go-Live
modal.project.4.outcome.0: Clear, confidence-driven cart experience addressing consumer uncertainty at the point of purchase.
modal.project.4.outcome.1: Reduced effort in checkout flows by eliminating unnecessary steps and ambiguity.
modal.project.4.outcome.2: Enabled subscriptions as a first-class action directly within the cart.
modal.project.4.outcome.3: Parity with modern retail UX standards, closing the gap with top-performing competitors.
modal.project.4.outcome.4: Growth in revenue, retention, and trust metrics through isolated, measurable UI improvements.
modal.project.4.outcomes.heading: Key Outcomes
modal.project.4.overview: Restoring consumer trust, reducing cognitive load, and enabling revenue-positive behaviors directly within the cart experience—including subscriptions, upsell, and frictionless express checkout. Partnering with executive leadership, PMO, and engineering to establish a design-led roadmap that aligns interaction decisions with business outcomes.

modal.project.4.quote.text: Reframing cart and checkout as a growth system rather than a technical necessity, early validations expect meaningful reductions in abandonment, faster checkout completion, and a measurable lift in membership and subscription adoption—directly impacting revenue and consumer trust.
modal.project.4.skills.heading: Skills Applied
modal.project.4.title: Cart & Checkout
modal.project.5.challenge: Leading the experience strategy and design for a new sitewide intelligent search component to address a critical trust and relevance failure. Legacy search returned inaccurate results, forcing users to rely on external search engines to find products—directly undermining conversion and member confidence.
modal.project.5.kpi.0.label: Smart Search Results
modal.project.5.kpi.1.label: Accuracy in SERP
modal.project.5.kpi.2.label: Revenue & Growth
modal.project.5.kpi.3.label: Official Kickoff Date
modal.project.5.outcome.0: Restore trust in on-site search by prioritizing exact, intent-matched results in the most visible positions.
modal.project.5.outcome.1: Reduce user effort by guiding searches that yield ambiguous or no results rather than failing silently.
modal.project.5.outcome.2: Accelerate paths to cart and checkout through intelligent product recommendations and upsell logic.
modal.project.5.outcome.3: Unify discovery across products, content, support, and business resources into a single, coherent experience.
modal.project.5.outcome.4: Establish search as a strategic member tool and growth lever supporting subscriptions, membership, and retention.
modal.project.5.outcomes.heading: Key Outcomes
modal.project.5.overview: Search is a core consumer experience layer—not a utility. By combining deterministic relevance logic with a custom AI API layer, the new system is designed to deliver exact, high-confidence results, guide users when intent is unclear, and surface recommendations that accelerate cart, checkout, subscription, and membership actions.
